name: coreai-skills
description: Skills for authoring, exporting, compiling, and running PyTorch models on Apple silicon via Core AI.

interface.shortDescription: Author, export, compress, and run PyTorch models on Apple silicon
interface.longDescription: Skills for deploying PyTorch models on Apple silicon via Core AI. Covers the end-to-end workflow: author models for on-device targets, export with coreai-torch, compile with coreai-build, and run with the Core AI runtime.
